customers.title: Strategic Sourcing Manager
customers.description: A growing automation integrator that needs dependable machined brackets and end-effector components in small, repeatable batches.

offer.subject: RFQ · Robot sensor brackets
offer.message: We need a responsive local shop for a pilot robot cell. Can you prove the first bracket and protect the delivery date?

customers.title: Prototype Program Buyer
customers.description: A regional mobility supplier buying prototype fixtures and low-volume aluminum components before vehicle programs enter production.

offer.subject: Prototype pocketed mounting plates
offer.message: Our prototype build moved forward. Review the print and tell us whether your current capacity supports eight plates this week.

customers.title: Manufacturing Engineer
customers.description: A controlled medical-device manufacturer that values traceability, documented inspection, clean handling, and disciplined change control.

offer.subject: Precision contoured instrument component
offer.message: We are qualifying a second source. Quality records and change discipline matter as much as the finished geometry.

customers.title: Operations Director
customers.description: A field-equipment producer seeking responsive machining support for control enclosures, rugged mounts, and service-critical replacement parts.

offer.subject: Service-critical control mounts
offer.message: A field retrofit created an urgent need. We will pay for speed, but only if the shop communicates risk before the due date.
